items.title: Why the huge premium on SK Hynix’s U.S. listing may prove short-lived.
items.description: If the Korean depository allows conversion, then the ADR premium on SK Hynix may contract.

items.title: Stripe and Advent reportedly team up to bid for battered PayPal. Michael Burry says the offer isn’t enough.
items.description: PayPal, the struggling payments processor, rallied in premarket trade on Wednesday on a report that rival Stripe is teaming up with private-equity group Advent International on a bid.

items.title: ‘I don’t want to sound callous’: Nobody knows when they’ll die. Don’t base when you claim Social Security on that.
items.description: “The actual date of death ultimately affects only the surviving beneficiaries.”

items.title: ASML is scrambling to build more capacity after blockbuster beat-and-raise quarter
items.description: Shares in the Dutch company climbed 6% in pre-market trading after it lifted its outlook by up to 19% for 2026.

items.title: Still struggling to find a buyer, actress Aubrey Plaza cuts price of $5 million L.A. home
items.description: Aubrey Plaza has lowered the price of her Spanish-style California compound by nearly a half-million dollars—less than two months after she relisted the property at a drastically reduced ask.

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: Brace for $4 gas again: How U.S.-Iran tensions are threatening to end the price break at the pump
items.description: Americans got some relief at the gas pump in recent weeks, enough to slow down inflation. That might not last long as the U.S. and Iran continue to vie for control of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: This overlooked index is a better investment than the S&P 500
items.description: We did the math over a 30-year period, and it’s not even close.

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

items.title: Your monthly Netflix bill is up 29% in just over a year. It’s time for Washington to step in.
items.description: Netflix is still a Wall Street favorite — and a target for government regulators
